zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann V. von Baden於大約1165年出生時，他的父親Hermann IV. von Baden31歲，母親Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen27歲。他於大約1220年與Irmengard vom Rhein在德國爾特波格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1243年1月16日享年79歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格巴登-巴登利希騰塔爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hermann V. von Baden于大约1165年出生时，他的父亲Hermann IV. von Baden31岁，母亲Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen27岁。他于大约1220年与Irmengard vom Rhein在德国爾特波格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1243年1月16日享年79岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格巴登-巴登利希騰塔爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Baden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Danish: patronymic from   Bade  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): probably an adoption of the German surname (see 1 above).

English: habitational name from a place called Bayden in Sussex, which is referred to in 17th-century documents but unlocated (it is possibly to be identified with Bainden, a manor in Mayfield, Sussex), or from Baydon in Wiltshire. The latter is from Old English beg + dūn, meaning ‘berry hill’.

variants.name: Bade
meanings: English (North Yorkshire) and Scottish: probably from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Bad(d)a, which is perhaps a short form of various compound names with the first element beadu ‘battle’.
North German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name composed with badu ‘strife, battle’.
North German: occupational name from Middle Low German bade ‘messenger’.

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann V. von Baden was born about 1165, his father, Hermann IV. von Baden, was 31 and his mother, Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen, was 27. He married Irmengard vom Rhein about 1220, in Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 16 January 1243, at the age of 79, and was buried in Lichtental, Baden-Baden, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann V. von Baden est né environ 1165, son père, Hermann IV. von Baden, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Irmengard vom Rhein environ 1220, à Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1243, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Lichtental, Baden-Baden, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.Wuerttemberg, Germany: Rod am Berg, Neu-Anspach, Hochtaunuskreis, Hessen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Hermann V. von Baden um 1165 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann IV. von Baden 31 und seine Mutter Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen 27. Er hat um 1220 in Württemberg, Deutschland Irmengard vom Rhein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Januar 1243 im Alter von 79 Jahren und wurde in Lichtental, Baden-Baden, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann V. von Baden è nato il circa 1165, il suo padre, Hermann IV. von Baden, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Irmengard vom Rhein circa 1220, nel Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 gennaio 1243, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Lichtental, Baden-Baden, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermann V. von Badenが約1165年に生まれた時，父Hermann IV. von Badenは31歳，母Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingenは27歳であった。約1220年にドイツウuルッテンバーグでIrmengard vom Rheinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1243年1月16日に79歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグバデン-バデンリチテンタルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann V. von Baden(이)가 대략 1165년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann IV. von Baden(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 독일 wu르테버그에서 Irmengard vom Rhein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1243년 1월 16일 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 바데-바든 리트탤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann V. von Baden nasceu aproximadamente 1165, seu pai, Hermann IV. von Baden, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Irmengard vom Rhein aproximadamente 1220, em Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1243, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Lichtental, Baden-Baden, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.Wuerttemberg, Germany: род ам бирг, неу-анспач, хочтаунускрис, Гессен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann V. von Baden родился около 1165 г., его отцу по имени Hermann IV. von Baden было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Bertha "Udalhildis" von Tübingen, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Irmengard vom Rhein около 1220 г. в местности вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 января 1243 г. в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности личтенталь, баден-баден, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.
